역대상 3:1.content: Now these were the sons of David, who were born to him in Hebron: the firstborn, Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second, Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess;

역대상 3:2.content: the third, Absalom the son of Maacah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur; the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith;

역대상 3:3.content: the fifth, Shephatiah of Abital; the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife:

역대상 3:4.content: six were born to him in Hebron; and he reigned there seven years and six months. He reigned thirty-three years in Jerusalem;

역대상 3:5.content: and these were born to him in Jerusalem: Shimea, Shobab, Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bathshua the daughter of Ammiel;

역대상 3:9.content: All these were the sons of David, in addition to the sons of the concubines; and Tamar was their sister.

역대상 3:10.content: Solomon’s son was Rehoboam, Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,

역대상 3:11.content: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,

역대상 3:12.content: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,

역대상 3:13.content: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,

역대상 3:14.content: Amon his son, and Josiah his son.

역대상 3:15.content: The sons of Josiah: the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, and the fourth Shallum.

역대상 3:16.content: The sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, and Zedekiah his son.

역대상 3:17.content: The sons of Jeconiah, the captive: Shealtiel his son,

역대상 3:18.content: Malchiram, Pedaiah, Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.

역대상 3:19.content: The sons of Pedaiah: Zerubbabel and Shimei. The sons of Zerubbabel: Meshullam and Hananiah; and Shelomith was their sister;

역대상 3:20.content: and Hashubah, Ohel, Berechiah, Hasadiah, and Jushab Hesed, five.

역대상 3:21.content: The sons of Hananiah: Pelatiah and Jeshaiah; the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shecaniah.

역대상 3:22.content: The son of Shecaniah: Shemaiah. The sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah, and Shaphat, six.

역대상 3:23.content: The sons of Neariah: Elioenai, Hizkiah, and Azrikam, three.

역대상 3:24.content: The sons of Elioenai: Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah, and Anani, seven.
